---
title: "An Interdisciplinary Approach To Coping With Parkinson's Disease And Its Relationship With Well-Being: Psychological, Neurological, And Social Variables"
date: "2024-01-01"
author: "Daniela Cecilia Thumala Dockendorff"
departamento: "Psicología"
coinvestigadores: "Norman Marcelo Arnold Cathalifaud"
categories: ["Fondecyt Regular"]
keywords: ["INTERDISCIPLINARY APPROACH (PSYCHOLOGICAL NEUROLOGICAL AND SOCIAL VARIABLES) PARKINSON'S DISEASE COPING AND WELL-BEING"]
concurso: "Fondecyt Regular"
codigo_proyecto: "1240683"
fecha_inicio: "2024"
fecha_termino: "2027"
duracion: "36 meses"
url_abstract: "https://post.anid.cl/frontend.php/es/postulacion/descargar/hash/408e35ad97d0072968c432c4444c758a"
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: file-text
      href: https://post.anid.cl/frontend.php/es/postulacion/descargar/hash/408e35ad97d0072968c432c4444c758a
---
